preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page URL and Home page loads successfully
steps: Launch the application in a browser session.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the Home page to complete loading.
Observe the displayed page state without authenticating.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without redirecting to authentication or showing access denial.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Wait for the Home page to load completely.
Locate the Person/Profile button.
Observe the visibility and enabled state of the Person/Profile button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Wait for the Home page to load completely.
Locate the Back button.
Observe the visibility and enabled state of the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates the guest user to the login page URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Wait for the Home page controls to become interactive.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
Observe the resulting browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL is exactly /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates the guest user to the customer-search workflow entry page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Wait for the Home page controls to become interactive.
Click the Customer signup button once.
Observe the resulting browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains /customer-search.

testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.
